analysis.interpretation: Counts as confirm/falsify only if both optimized and baseline ZT are independently parsed from a same-study angle/voltage-controlled source.
analysis.metric: optimized 30-degree/30V ZT parsed; independent baseline/random ZT not parsed
missing_decisive_inputs: clean voltage/angle-vs-ZT table or source-data row

rows_used_from_tan_study.zt_context: 30 V external electric-field-assisted deposition, a greatly high Z T value of 1.75
rows_used_from_tan_study.zt_context_30V: At room temperature, a high ZT value of 1.75 can be achieved in the deposited Sb 2 Te 3 film under 30 V external electric field.

rows_used_from_tan_study.angle_context: 40 V mapped to ~40 degree GB angle from article prose

downloaded_sources.label: Tan et al. 2020 Scientific Reports Sb2Te3 angular intraplanar GB open HTML

Tan et al. 2020 Scientific Reports Sb2Te3 angular intraplanar GB PMC mirror
Poudel et al. 2008 nanostructured BiSbTe PDF mirror, baseline context only
downloaded_sources.notes: download/extract failed: download failed for https://scispace.com/pdf/high-thermoelectric-performance-of-nanostructured-bismuth-4evuadx0tz.pdf: HTTP Error 405: Not Allowed

notes: Sb2Te3 is a Bi2Te3-family proxy, not exact Bi2Te3.
Exact MAT4 status requires independent same-study baseline/random ZT and 30-degree optimized ZT.
Voltage-series/table parsing is accepted as independent; a lone 30 V optimized sentence is only partial_supportive.

falsification_logic.confirm_like: A same-study Bi2Te3/Bi2Te3-family source independently exposes ZT_30deg and random/baseline ZT with ratio 1.1-1.3.
falsification_logic.data_limited: Neither optimized nor baseline ZT could be extracted from public text.
falsification_logic.falsify_like: Adequate same-study independent angle-controlled ZT data expose a ratio outside the 1.1-1.3 window.
falsification_logic.partial_directional: Transport directionality is parsed, but exact ZT ratio is unavailable.
falsification_logic.partial_estimated_ratio: ZT ratio is estimated from explicit percentage-gain prose; useful but non-decisive because denominator is not independently parsed.
falsification_logic.partial_supportive: Open source confirms enhanced 30-degree/30V engineered state but baseline ZT or exact Bi2Te3 condition is not cleanly extractable.

test_name: 30-degree grain-boundary ZT gain in Bi2Te3-family thermoelectrics from public literature
